questionHtml: The initial temperature of the gas is 290 K. Calculate the temperature of the gas at the start of the adiabatic expansion.
markschemeHtml:
use of PV = nRT OR use of P T = constant

T = «5 x 290 =» 1450 «K»

meta.title: The initial temperature of the gas is 290 K. Calculate the temperature of the gas at the start of the adiabatic expansion.
